briefdescription.para: mean (Gaussian, inverse Gaussian, autoregressive model), mean direction (von Mises),
scale parameter (gamma, inverse Gaussian, zero-inflated gamma)
standard deviation (Gaussian, linear model, autoregressive model), concentration (von Mises),

memberdef.argsstring: (continuous_parametric iident=GAUSSIAN, double ilocation=D_INF, double idispersion=D_DEFAULT, double izero_probability=D_DEFAULT, angle_unit iunit=DEGREE)
memberdef.name: ContinuousParametric

parameterdescription.para: location parameter (Gaussian, inverse Gaussian, autoregressive model, von Mises), shape parameter (gamma, zero-inflated gamma) or intercept (linear model),
dispersion parameter (Gaussian, von Mises, linear model, autoregressive model) or scale parameter (gamma, zero-inflated gamma, inverse Gaussian),
zero probability (zero-inflated gamma), slope (linear model) or autoregressive coefficient (autoregressive model),

briefdescription.para: Assignment operator of the ContinuousParametric class.
Writing of the parameters of a continuous distribution.
Writing of the characteristics of a continuous distribution.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::ostream &os, bool file_flag=false, bool cumul_flag=false, const Histogram *histo1=NULL, const FrequencyDistribution *histo2=NULL)
memberdef.name: ascii_print

parameterdescription.para: flag on the writing of the cumulative distribution function,

briefdescription.para: Writing of the parameters of a continuous distribution at the spreadsheet format.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::ostream &os, bool cumul_flag=false, const Histogram *histo1=NULL, const FrequencyDistribution *histo2=NULL)
memberdef.name: spreadsheet_print

briefdescription.para: Writing of a continuous distribution at the spreadsheet format.

parameterdescription.para: flag on the writing of the cumulative distribution function,

briefdescription.para: Writing of the characteristics of a continuous distribution at the spreadsheet format.
Writing of the parameters of a continuous distribution at the Gnuplot format.
Writing of a continuous distribution at the Gnuplot format.
Writing of a q-q plot at the Gnuplot format.

parameterdescription.para: pointer on the empirical cumulative distribution function.
pointer on the empirical cumulative distribution function.
pointer on the empirical cumulative distribution function.

briefdescription.para: Computation of the number of parameters of a continuous distribution.
Computation of the density of a von Mises distribution integrated on an interval.
Computation of the density of a distribution integrated on an interval.
Computation of the cumulative distribution function of a von Mises distribution.

Computation of the distance between 2 continuous distributions (sup of the absolute difference between the cumulative distribution functions in the case of non-crossing cumulative distribution functions; in the general case, sum of sup on intervals between 2 crossings of cumulative distribution functions).
Analysis of the format of a ContinuousParametric object.

parameterdescription.para: reference on the file line index,
identifier of the last distribution in the list.
